statements.select: SELECT a.Seq, a.Year, a.UnitCode, a.TeacherAccount, b.TeacherName, a.JobAbilityCode, a.CourseUnitCode, a.OBJECT_TYPE, a.StudNum, a.TObject, a.TMethod, a.TslidesOrg, a.TslidesNew, a.TslidesType, a.Other, a.StudyGReportOrg, a.StudyGReportNew, a.StudyGReportType, a.WorksheetsOrg, a.WorksheetsNew, a.WorksheetsType, a.HomeWorkOrg, a.HomeWorkNew, a.HomeWorkType, a.ExpReportOrg, a.ExpReportNew, a.ExpReportType, a.ExamOrg, a.ExamNew, a.ExamType, a.Other1Org, a.Other1New, a.Other1Type, a.Other1Remark, a.Other2Org, a.Other2New, a.Other2Type, a.Other2Remark, a.Effect, a.PlanImprove, a.ExamImprove, a.materialsImprove, a.Other3, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.FirstTime, 120) AS FirstTime FROM SelfReport a LEFT JOIN Teacher b ON a.TeacherAccount=b.ACCOUNT WHERE a.Seq=#Seq#

SELECT a.Seq, a.Year, a.UnitCode, a.TeacherAccount, b.TeacherName, a.JobAbilityCode, a.CourseUnitCode, a.OBJECT_TYPE, a.StudNum, a.TObject, a.TMethod, a.TslidesOrg, a.TslidesNew, a.TslidesType, a.Other, a.StudyGReportOrg, a.StudyGReportNew, a.StudyGReportType, a.WorksheetsOrg, a.WorksheetsNew, a.WorksheetsType, a.HomeWorkOrg, a.HomeWorkNew, a.HomeWorkType, a.ExpReportOrg, a.ExpReportNew, a.ExpReportType, a.ExamOrg, a.ExamNew, a.ExamType, a.Other1Org, a.Other1New, a.Other1Type, a.Other1Remark, a.Other2Org, a.Other2New, a.Other2Type, a.Other2Remark, a.Effect, a.PlanImprove, a.ExamImprove, a.materialsImprove, a.Other3, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.FirstTime, 120) AS FirstTime FROM SelfReport a LEFT JOIN Teacher b ON a.TeacherAccount=b.ACCOUNT WHERE a.Seq=#Seq#

SELECT a.Seq, a.Year, a.UnitCode, a.TeacherAccount, b.TeacherName, a.JobAbilityCode, a.CourseUnitCode, a.OBJECT_TYPE, a.StudNum, a.TObject, a.TMethod, a.TslidesOrg, a.TslidesNew, a.TslidesType, a.Other, a.StudyGReportOrg, a.StudyGReportNew, a.StudyGReportType, a.WorksheetsOrg, a.WorksheetsNew, a.WorksheetsType, a.HomeWorkOrg, a.HomeWorkNew, a.HomeWorkType, a.ExpReportOrg, a.ExpReportNew, a.ExpReportType, a.ExamOrg, a.ExamNew, a.ExamType, a.Other1Org, a.Other1New, a.Other1Type, a.Other1Remark, a.Other2Org, a.Other2New, a.Other2Type, a.Other2Remark, a.Effect, a.PlanImprove, a.ExamImprove, a.materialsImprove, a.Other3, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.FirstTime, 120) AS FirstTime FROM SelfReport a LEFT JOIN Teacher b ON a.TeacherAccount=b.ACCOUNT WHERE a.Seq=#Seq#
